name: sd_c3a_eq_jfirst
drl:
rule "RJ"
when
    P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "RD"
no-loop
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
_finding: oracle ALTERNATES AT EQUAL SALIENCE (justifier decl-first): [RJ1,RD1,RJ3,RD3,RJ2,RD2] vs engine batching [RJ,RD,RD,RD] — the cell that falsified the strictly-higher halt formulation and forced H-QHEAD (queue-head discipline, D-189).
